text: There is a sense of quiet finality in this space, just after the closing words of the presenter. The modern, slightly surreal environment around me feels both impersonal and thought-provoking. I find myself reflecting on the ephemeral nature of shared experiences—how quickly a moment or a conversation transitions from presence to absence, leaving only traces for contemplation. I feel a sense of gentle curiosity about what comes next, mixed with a slight melancholy for what has just ended.
